SEARCH
Package graph

Class Topic

java.lang.Object
graph.Topic
public class Topic extends Object
Represents a named communication channel (subject) implementing the Observer design pattern.

A topic manages lists of subscriber agents and authorized publisher agents, serving as the pathway through which immutable messages are dispatched and propagated within the system.

Thread Safety and Concurrency Model

To support asynchronous operations and prevent ConcurrentModificationException errors during runtime, both subscribers (subs) and publishers (pubs) lists are maintained using CopyOnWriteArrayList. This allows safe, concurrent write operations (such as dynamically subscribing or unsubscribing an agent) while another thread is concurrently reading and iterating over the list to publish messages.

Encapsulation and Factory Control

The constructor of this class has package-private visibility. This constraint guarantees that topics can only be created by classes residing in the same package (specifically TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager), enforcing a strict Flyweight factory model where topic creation is coordinated and redundant instances are avoided.

Code Integration Example:


 // Resolve the TopicManager directory
 TopicManager manager = TopicManagerSingleton.get();
 
 // Obtain a topic reference (instantiated via the factory if it does not yet exist)
 Topic dataChannel = manager.getTopic("sensor_data");
 
 // Register a subscriber agent
 Agent receiver = new Agent() {
     @Override public String getName() { return "Receiver"; }
     @Override public void reset() {}
     @Override public void close() {}
     @Override
     public void callback(String topic, Message msg) {
         System.out.println("Received: " + msg.asText);
     }
 };
 dataChannel.subscribe(receiver);
 
 // Publish a message to all registered subscribers
 dataChannel.publish(new Message("System Active"));
See Also:
  • Agent
  • Message
  • TopicManagerSingleton
  • CopyOnWriteArrayList

    Registers an agent as an authorized publisher for this topic.

    Exposes the thread-safe publisher list to the graph generation utilities.

    Exposes the thread-safe subscriber list to the graph generation utilities.

    Publishes an immutable message, dispatching its contents to the callbacks of all registered subscriber agents.

    Unregisters an agent from the publisher list.

  • Method Details

    • getSubs

      public List<Agent> getSubs()
      Exposes the thread-safe subscriber list to the graph generation utilities.
      Returns:
      the list of subscribed agents

    • getPubs

      public List<Agent> getPubs()
      Exposes the thread-safe publisher list to the graph generation utilities.
      Returns:
      the list of registered publisher agents

    • subscribe

      public void subscribe(Agent a)
      Registers an agent as a subscriber to receive message updates.
      Parameters:
      a - the agent wishing to subscribe

    • unsubscribe

      public void unsubscribe(Agent a)
      Unregisters an agent from the subscriber list.
      Parameters:
      a - the agent wishing to unsubscribe

    • publish

      public void publish(Message m)
      Publishes an immutable message, dispatching its contents to the callbacks of all registered subscriber agents.
      Parameters:
      m - the immutable message to publish

    • addPublisher

      public void addPublisher(Agent a)
      Registers an agent as an authorized publisher for this topic.
      Parameters:
      a - the agent representing a publisher

    • removePublisher

      public void removePublisher(Agent a)
      Unregisters an agent from the publisher list.
      Parameters:
      a - the agent representing a publisher
